improvement: Bind the canonical queue, append-only queue projections, and their referenced evidence paths to one immutable Git commit and deterministic source digest before materialization review.
observed: The implementation resolves a full commit SHA before reading queue state.
All canonical queue, projection, and evidence bytes are read through git object access at that exact commit.
The generated digest excludes generated_at, so repeated reads of the same commit produce the same source digest.
Snapshot consistency never authorizes canonical materialization by itself.
inferred: Commit-bound reads remove the prior mixed-time working-tree ambiguity from continuity review inputs.
proposed: Feed the snapshot-bound source set into the existing queue reconciler, then sign or policy-bind the resulting candidate under a separately defined authority contract.
superseded: Treating a collection of current working-tree reads as one coherent repository moment.
unresolved: The committed tests have not been observed executing in CI or a fresh checkout.
The snapshot binder inventories and hashes source inputs but does not yet invoke queue reconciliation from those exact blob bytes.

included: public evidence artifact paths and hashes

falsification_route: Run the committed tests in a fresh checkout, mutate the working tree after committing, and verify the source digest and queue count remain bound to the selected commit; then alter a committed projection or evidence blob and verify a new commit produces a different digest.
